steps.title: Identify the logical relationship at the blank
steps.content: The sentence before the blank states that the photograph fuels the poem's exploration of love and cultural identity. The sentence containing the blank adds a second, distinct observation: that in responding to Ramirez's artwork, the poem also reflects on the relationship between poetry and other art forms. These are two complementary points about the same poem — neither one contradicts, illustrates, nor restates the other. The blank needs a transition that signals addition.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — Conversely,: signals a direct contrast or reversal, but reflecting on art forms is complementary to exploring love and identity, not opposite to it. ✗
  • Choice B — What's more,: signals an additional point that builds on what preceded it, which fits: the poem does both things. ✓
  • Choice C — For instance,: signals a specific example of the preceding claim, but the second observation is a new, separate point about the poem — not an illustration of exploring love and cultural identity. ✗
  • Choice D — In other words,: signals a restatement of the same idea, but the two observations are distinct points, not paraphrases of each other. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
